lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Add GANZZAHL_ERWEITERT to support extended integer types (Long).
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Added GANZZAHL_ERWEITERT to the Datentyp enum.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Add ZEITPUNKT_LETZTE_AENDERUNG to support tracking last modification timestamps.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Added ZEITPUNKT_LETZTE_AENDERUNG to the Datentyp enum.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Add ZEITPUNKT_ERSTELLUNG to support tracking creation timestamps.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Added ZEITPUNKT_ERSTELLUNG to the Datentyp enum.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Add ERSTELLT_VON to support tracking the creator of an entity.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Added ERSTELLT_VON to the Datentyp enum.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Add MODIFIZIERT_VON to support tracking the modifier of an entity.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Added MODIFIZIERT_VON to the Datentyp enum.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Add VERSION to support optimistic locking or versioning columns.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Added VERSION to the Datentyp enum.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Add BINARY to support binary data types.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Added BINARY to the Datentyp enum.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Replace deprecated StringUtils.equals with Strings.CS.equals from Apache Commons Lang3.
Removed unused import of Apache Commons Lang3 StringUtils.
Made Entitaet implement the EntitaetreferenzIf interface to enforce a contract.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Changed class declaration to 'public class Entitaet implements EntitaetreferenzIf'

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Added a new field to store database index configuration for the entity.
Removed helper methods that relied on the removed StringUtils dependency.
Added a method to return an Entitaetreferenz object, likely to satisfy the new interface contract.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Added getEntitaetreferenz() method returning a built Entitaetreferenz

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: The class is made to implement the EntitaetreferenzIf interface to enforce a contract or enable polymorphism.
A fetchType field is added to control JPA fetching behavior for the reference.
A cascadeType field is added to control JPA cascading behavior for the reference.
Added a new boolean field 'fachlichEindeutig' to the Entitaetsfeld class to support business uniqueness constraints.
Added a new boolean field 'alsTabelle' to the Entitaetsfeld class to support table-like representation.
Reformatted field declarations to align variable names and improve code readability.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: public final boolean optional = false; -> public final boolean optional = false;

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the class rename from MaskenEntitaetsfeld to Entitaetsfeld.
Change the type of the parameterFelder field from List<MaskenEntitaetsfeld> to List<Entitaetsfeld> to match the renamed class.
Change the type of the tabellendefinitionParameterFelder field from List<MaskenEntitaetsfeld> to List<Entitaetsfeld> to match the renamed class.

lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Migrate assertion import from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 to align with the test framework used in the class.
Replace UI-specific domain classes (MaskenEntitaet, MaskenEntitaetsfeld) with generic domain classes (Entitaet, Entitaetsfeld) to decouple UI generation from domain definition.
Update builder method calls from 'maskenfeld' to 'feld' to reflect the renaming of the domain classes.
Update the TypeScript import source package name to reflect a new organization or library name.
Replace JUnit 4 static import with JUnit 5 equivalent to align with the test framework migration.
Remove imports for UI model classes that are no longer used in the test after refactoring.
lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Removed imports for Checkbox, Dropdown, MaskeGridItems, UiModelReact

lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Rename the test method to better reflect its purpose of testing the domain model generation.
Rename the helper method to match the new test method name and intent.
Remove UI-specific model construction (Checkbox, Dropdown, etc.) to focus the test solely on the DomainModel structure.
lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Removed Checkbox, Dropdown, MaskeGridItems, and UiModelReact builder calls

lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Update the LowCodeModel builder to exclude the UI component since it is no longer constructed.

lowcode.model/pom.xml.general_idea: Refactor module to inherit configuration from a parent POM instead of defining it locally.
Remove explicit version for Lombok to inherit it from the parent POM.
Remove explicit version for Gson to inherit it from the parent POM.
Remove explicit version for Commons Lang3 to inherit it from the parent POM.
Remove explicit version for Commons IO to inherit it from the parent POM.
Switch JUnit dependency from engine to api artifact to align with standard JUnit 5 usage.
Remove explicit version for JUnit Jupiter API to inherit it from the parent POM.
Remove deprecated JUnit Platform Runner dependency.
Update JUnit engine dependency to use the correct artifact ID and remove version.
Remove explicit version for EqualsVerifier to inherit it from the parent POM.
Remove local maven-compiler-plugin configuration to inherit Java version and annotation processor settings from parent.
Remove local properties definitions that are now managed by the parent POM.
lowcode.model/pom.xml.human_impl: Removed <properties> block containing java.version, lombok-version, etc.

.gitignore.general_idea: Added Eclipse-specific project files (.DS_Store, .classpath, .project, .settings) to the gitignore to prevent IDE metadata from being tracked.
Added Maven build output directory and release properties file to the gitignore to exclude generated artifacts from version control.
